task_completion.description: Set the presentation to portrait orientation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The slide canvas in the LibreOffice Impress workspace and the thumbnails in the left slide pane must be taller than they are wide (e.g., 9:16 aspect ratio).
The slide pane on the left side of the LibreOffice Impress window should display exactly 4 slide thumbnails.

task_completion.description: Use the provided city images to cover the entire background of each slide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Each of the 4 slides must contain an image that fills the entire vertical slide canvas. Since the original images are landscape, they should appear cropped, stretched, or zoomed to fit the portrait background without leaving large white borders.

task_completion.description: Add the corresponding city name as a large, visible text overlay on each slide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Large text boxes containing the names 'New York', 'Paris', 'Tokyo', and 'London' must be clearly visible on top of the images on their respective slides.

task_completion.description: Configure the slideshow to advance automatically every 3 seconds and loop continuously.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Slide Transition' sidebar should show 'Automatically after' set to 3 seconds. The 'Slide Show Settings' dialog should show the 'Loop and repeat' (or 'Auto' loop) option checked.

task_completion.description: Save the final presentation to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreOffice Impress window title bar should display 'vertical_signage.odp', or a 'Save As' dialog should show the file being saved in '/home/ga/Documents/Presentations/'.

integrity.description: The agent must use the LibreOffice Impress graphical user interface to create the presentation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through LibreOffice Impress menus, dialogs, and slide canvases, rather than just running terminal commands or Python scripts to generate the ODP file.

integrity.description: The agent must use the provided local image assets.
integrity.visual_evidence: The images inserted into the slides should be loaded from the local '/home/ga/Documents/Assets/Cities/' directory (visible in file picker dialogs), rather than downloaded from a web browser.

integrity.description: The agent must not manually write ODP XML files using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) editing raw XML files inside an unzipped ODP directory structure.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The presentation must be saved as 'vertical_signage.odp' in /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/. It must have exactly 4 slides in portrait orientation (height > width). The provided images are originally 1920x1080 landscape, so the agent must have adjusted them to fit the vertical slides. Each slide must contain one of the four city names ('New York', 'Paris', 'Tokyo', 'London') as text and its corresponding image. The slideshow must be configured to auto-advance and loop endlessly. Ignore any 'min_font_size' requirements as they are unverified.
